history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, wavy hair stands in the center of a modern billiard hall. He is wearing a dark gray t-shirt, black ripped jeans, and a silver necklace with a blue pendant. He holds a pool cue in his right hand, resting it on the floor. The man is positioned in front of a pool table with colorful billiard balls arranged on it. The background reveals multiple pool tables, some with cues on them, and other patrons in the distance. The hall is dimly lit, with prominent overhead lighting fixtures featuring a mix of white and purple panels. The walls are a textured gray, and there are tall, dark gray pillars with vertical yellow accent lights. Exposed silver ductwork snakes across the dark ceiling. The overall atmosphere is contemporary and relaxed, with a focus on entertainment. The color palette is dominated by grays, blacks, and the vibrant colors of the billiard balls and accent lighting. The style is realistic, with a slightly cinematic feel due to the lighting.
